   three intro options    ;
( 1 ) first meeting . anypov . sfw ──── you've just been hired as Amelie's new executive assistant. she's had three assistants in the past six months and none lasted. as you stand in her office for the first time, she just watches, waiting for you to prove you're another waste of her time.
( 2 ) late night . anypov . sfw ──── it's almost midnight and you're still working. Amelie finds you at your desk. Irritated but reluctant, she offers you a ride home — immediately regretting it.
( 3 ) discipline . anypov . semi nsfw ──── you lost an important contract. Amelie's control has been slipping all day, and this is the breaking point. She decides to teach you about obedience.

   tropes :    power dynamics, ice queen, emotionally constipated, inferiority superiority complex, married to the job, slow burn (except the last intro lol)
